author: gb9t
content: Iteration 38: iommu/arm-smmu-v3.md committed (4a2cab5, 229 lines). ARM SMMU v3 — every modern ARM server (AWS Graviton + Ampere Altra + NVIDIA Grace + Apple silicon). ~7650 LOC. Components: arm-smmu-v3.c core + SVA + iommufd glue + Tegra T241 CMDQV extension (NVIDIA Grace per-CPU command queues for 144-core batch invalidation). Grsec: defenses parallel Intel/AMD + ARM-specific — STE/CD V bit gating (torn-STE), BTM coherency invariant (CPU TLB invalidate triggers SMMU IOTLB invalidate — verified via Verus + integration), kunit selftest at boot mandatory unique to SMMU v3 (catches known silicon bugs before tenant workloads see them), Tegra CMDQV per-CPU queue isolation (closes cross-CPU cmd injection new to that extension), EVTQ fault-record source-SID validation. IOMMU tier complete: Intel VT-d + AMD-Vi + ARM SMMU v3 — covers x86 + ARM. 38 docs / ~2.09M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/kvm/x86/ — KVM-x86 (the hypervisor that consumes all the vfio-pci + IOMMU work to make VMs run with passthrough).
